case.title: BELLINGHAM BAY IMP CO v. CITY OF NEW WHATCOM

opinion.h: BELLINGHAM BAY IMP CO v. CITY OF NEW WHATCOM, 172 U.S. 320 (1899)
BELLINGHAM BAY IMP. CO. v. CITY OF NEW WHATCOM (two cases).
opinion.p: These cases involve the same questions as in Bellingham Bay & B. C. R. Co. v. City of New Whatcom, 19 Sup. Ct. 205, and the same judgments of affirmance will be entered in them.[ Bellingham Bay Imp Co v. City of New Whatcom 172 U.S. 320 (1899) ]
